title: Coin balance now syncs everywhere + Edit Post crash fix
notes: FIX: Coin chip on Home / Messages / Search / Wallet now shows the same balance — any change (purchase, call deduct, promo) propagates everywhere instantly
FIX: Edit Post no longer crashes the feed tab — saveEditPost was referencing variables only available on user-profile views
NEW: Calls deduct coins live (every 60s) and persist the final total to your profile on hang-up — works across devices via Supabase realtime
NEW: Wallet purchase instantly updates every chip in the app, no more stale 1,240
